nodes.name: config.ts
nodes.summary: Central environment configuration exposing tenant/user identifiers, the HelixDB URL, and embedding model settings used across the memory pipeline.
nodes.languageNotes: Plain module-level const exports read from process.env with defaults.

nodes.name: bootstrap.ts
nodes.summary: One-time bootstrap script that creates the required HelixDB secondary indexes via a write batch before the memory system is used.

nodes.name: client.ts
nodes.summary: Constructs the shared HelixDB client and provides writeWithRetry, a durable-write helper with exponential backoff on conflict errors.

nodes.name: entities.ts
nodes.summary: Entity persistence layer: hybrid vector+text candidate search, canonical Entity node creation, and alias merging in the memory graph.
nodes.languageNotes: Combines vectorSearchNodesWith and textSearchNodesWith into a deduplicated candidate set keyed by entityKey.

nodes.name: memories.ts
nodes.summary: Core memory persistence layer that writes Memory nodes with type-driven decay/TTL, links mentions and relations, and handles supersede/extend/bump lifecycle operations.
nodes.languageNotes: Type-driven decay (decayFor) sets per-memory-type TTL; relational memories are modeled as edges per the schema's frozen decisions.

nodes.name: schema.ts
nodes.summary: Single source of truth for the memory graph's label and edge name constants plus the normalizeKey helper for tenant-safe canonical entity keys.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses `as const` constant maps (L, E) so label/edge names are never string literals elsewhere.

nodes.name: smoke.ts
nodes.summary: End-to-end smoke test script that seeds entities and memories, exercises the write path, and cleans up, validating the HelixDB integration.

nodes.name: drive.ts
nodes.summary: Driver script that emits turn events into the ingestion pipeline and inspects memory counts, used to exercise the hooks/event flow end to end.

nodes.name: drive_sync.ts
nodes.summary: Synchronous driver script that runs the write pipeline directly against HelixDB for testing turn ingestion without the async worker.

nodes.name: erRepair.ts
nodes.summary: Entity-resolution repair sweep that detects duplicate entities via similarity scoring and merges them to keep the canonical graph clean.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses embedding cosine and trigram alias similarity (match/scorers) to detect near-duplicate Entity nodes.

nodes.name: sweeps.ts
nodes.summary: Periodic maintenance sweeps that decay idle memory weights, forget low-weight stale memories, and expire contextual (TTL) memories.

nodes.name: worker.ts
nodes.summary: Orchestration backbone for the write path: registers iii queue worker functions (ingestTurn, flushSession, sweepIdle) and cron triggers for idle flushing and maintenance sweeps (decay, forget, contextual expiry, ER repair).
nodes.languageNotes: Registers anonymous async callbacks via the iii-sdk registerFunction/registerTrigger API rather than top-level named functions, so structural extraction sees no functions.

nodes.name: e2e.ts
nodes.summary: End-to-end test harness for the read path: wipes the tenant, ingests a session's prompts through the write pipeline, then exercises readPath and prints recall results.

nodes.name: buffer.ts
nodes.summary: Session-window buffering layer: provides flush-trigger logic plus file-backed and in-memory buffer stores that accumulate turns until a flush condition (size, boundary, topic-shift, time cap) fires.

nodes.name: e2e.ts
nodes.summary: End-to-end test harness for the write path: wipes the tenant, ingests a session through the pipeline, then dumps persisted memories and entities to verify extraction and persistence.

nodes.name: extract.ts
nodes.summary: Extraction step of the write pipeline: renders a buffered session window into a prompt and calls the LLM to produce validated candidate memories and coreference mention clusters.

nodes.name: ingest.ts
nodes.summary: Ingest entry for a single turn: salience-gates the turn, appends it to the session buffer, and triggers a flush when a buffer condition is met.

nodes.name: pipeline.ts
nodes.summary: Core write pipeline: flushes a session buffer by extracting candidates, embedding them, resolving entities and conflicts, and persisting memories with supersede/extends links.

nodes.name: remember.ts
nodes.summary: Explicit-memory helper: buffers user-supplied content as a boundary turn and immediately flushes it through the write pipeline, used by the MCP remember tool.

nodes.name: salience.ts
nodes.summary: Salience gate that scores a turn against regex signals (named entities, commitments, preferences, goals, assertions) to decide whether it is worth buffering for memory extraction.

nodes.name: types.ts
nodes.summary: Shared write-path type definitions: TurnEvent, BufferedTurn, SessionBuffer, CandidateMemory, MentionCluster, ExtractionResult, and FlushReason.

nodes.name: write.test.ts
nodes.summary: Unit tests for the write path covering the salience gate and buffer flush-reason logic with synthetic turn and buffer fixtures.

nodes.name: retrieve.ts
nodes.summary: Read-side HelixDB access layer providing hybrid vector + BM25 recall, similarity search, relational fact traversal, and entity validation against the tenant-scoped memory graph.
nodes.languageNotes: Builds dynamic Helix queries via readBatch().varAs(...) projection batches and live/expiry filtering helpers.

nodes.name: embed.ts
nodes.summary: Embedding helper that loads env config and produces vector embeddings for one or many texts via the configured embedding model client.

nodes.name: server.ts
nodes.summary: UniMind MCP server entry point that registers the recall and remember tools over stdio, exposing long-term memory search and on-demand storage to Claude Code.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses @modelcontextprotocol/sdk McpServer with zod input schemas and a StdioServerTransport; tool handlers run at module scope.

nodes.name: header.ts
nodes.summary: Formats ranked memory parts (goals, contextual notes, relational facts) into the injected context header string and tracks which memory ids were surfaced.

nodes.name: planner.ts
nodes.summary: Query planner that uses an LLM to extract relevant memory types, entities, topics, and context scope from a prompt before retrieval runs.

nodes.name: rank.ts
nodes.summary: Ranking module that merges multi-channel memory candidates, scores them by similarity and recency decay, and selects the top set within a token budget.

nodes.name: readPath.ts
nodes.summary: Orchestrates the full read path: plan the query, embed and validate entities, fetch recall and relational facts in parallel, rank results, and build the injected context header.

nodes.name: recall.ts
nodes.summary: Public recall entry point that embeds a query, fetches hybrid candidates, ranks them, bumps usage counters, and returns formatted memory hits for the MCP recall tool.

nodes.name: complete.ts
nodes.summary: LLM client wrapper that loads environment config and exposes jsonComplete for JSON-mode chat completions used by the write pipeline.
nodes.languageNotes: Hand-rolled .env loader reads and parses the file directly rather than via a dependency.

nodes.name: engine.test.ts
nodes.summary: Unit tests for the generic match engine, verifying blocking, scoring, sorting, and adjudication behavior using stub scorers.

nodes.name: engine.ts
nodes.summary: Generic matching engine that blocks candidates, scores them via a pluggable config, sorts by score, and optionally adjudicates the gray-zone matches.
nodes.languageNotes: Strategy pattern via a config object supplying block/score/adjudicate callbacks.

nodes.name: scorers.ts
nodes.summary: Collection of similarity scoring primitives — cosine similarity, vector-distance conversion, trigram fuzzy matching, alias matching, and weighted score combination.

nodes.name: conflict.ts
nodes.summary: Conflict resolution for incoming memory writes: matches against similar existing memories and applies an LLM adjudication policy to decide create/update/skip relations.

nodes.name: entityResolve.ts
nodes.summary: Entity resolution for write clusters: searches candidate entities, scores them by alias and vector similarity, adjudicates ambiguous matches via LLM, and creates or merges entities.

nodes.name: classify.ts
nodes.summary: LLM-based baseline classifier for the drift-gate experiment: asks an OpenAI chat model whether consecutive prompts represent a topic shift, then scores precision/recall/F1 against labeled data.

nodes.name: eval.ts
nodes.summary: Embedding-based drift-gate evaluation harness that sweeps cosine-distance thresholds and entity-overlap parameters to find the F1-optimal heuristic gate configuration against labeled sessions.
nodes.languageNotes: Caches embeddings to disk and uses Math-based cosine distance plus regex entity extraction to approximate a no-LLM drift gate.

nodes.name: label.ts
nodes.summary: Ground-truth labeling tool that asks an OpenAI chat model to identify topic-shift points within each session's prompt sequence and writes the labeled dataset for downstream evaluation.

nodes.name: openai.ts
nodes.summary: Shared utility module for the drift-gate experiment that loads .env credentials, exports a configured OpenAI client, and provides data/output path helpers.

nodes.name: capture.ts
nodes.summary: Claude Code PostToolUse hook entry point that reads the tool payload from stdin, normalizes it into a TurnEvent, and fires it asynchronously to the memory ingest pipeline without blocking the user.
nodes.languageNotes: CLI hook script that reads stdin and uses Promise.race with a timeout to guarantee it never blocks the editor.

nodes.name: emit.ts
nodes.summary: Fire-and-forget event emitter that connects to the iii worker engine, triggers the unimind ingestTurn function with the turn event, and shuts down without ever blocking the calling hook.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses TriggerAction.Void() for fire-and-forget dispatch with a short flush delay to avoid racing WebSocket shutdown.

nodes.name: inject.ts
nodes.summary: Claude Code UserPromptSubmit hook that reads the user prompt from stdin, recalls relevant memories via readPath, logs a checkpoint, and injects retrieved context back into the session via stdout.
nodes.languageNotes: Combines memory retrieval (readPath) with a fire-and-forget emit, both bounded by Promise.race timeouts.

nodes.name: silence.ts
nodes.summary: Stdout-discipline utility that captures the real stdout writer and redirects stray logging to stderr, ensuring only intended hook protocol output reaches Claude Code on stdout.

nodes.name: .dockerignore
nodes.summary: Docker build-context exclusion list that keeps node_modules, git metadata, experiments, the dashboard, logs, and secrets out of worker image builds.

nodes.name: AGENTS.md
nodes.summary: Agent-facing guide for working in this HelixDB project, covering the helix CLI workflow, installation fallbacks, container-runtime caveats, and query syntax conventions.

nodes.name: ARCHITECTURE.mdx
nodes.summary: Authoritative system design doc for Unimind, detailing the HelixDB data model, asynchronous write path, synchronous read path, the reusable matching engine, maintenance crons, MCP server, and deployment topology.
nodes.languageNotes: MDX long-form design document with 29 sections spanning data model, write/read pipelines, and deployment topology.

nodes.name: docker-compose.yml
nodes.summary: Full-stack Compose definition that brings up MinIO, a one-shot bucket setup, HelixDB, the iii orchestration engine, the UniMind worker, and the dashboard in dependency order.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses health-check and service_completed_successfully conditions to enforce a strict startup ordering across six services.

nodes.name: minio
nodes.summary: MinIO object-storage service backing HelixDB's on-disk persistence, exposing an S3-compatible API with a liveness health check.

nodes.name: minio-setup
nodes.summary: One-shot job that waits for MinIO to be healthy, creates the helix-db bucket via the mc client, and exits.

nodes.name: helix
nodes.summary: HelixDB enterprise-dev memory store providing graph, vector, and BM25 search, persisting to the MinIO S3 bucket and published on host port 6969.

nodes.name: iii
nodes.summary: iii orchestration engine providing the queues, functions, and cron backbone for the write pipeline, exposing WebSocket, REST, stream, and Prometheus ports.

nodes.name: worker
nodes.summary: UniMind worker built from docker/worker.Dockerfile that runs the asynchronous write pipeline and maintenance crons against HelixDB and the iii engine.

nodes.name: dashboard
nodes.summary: Next.js HelixDB dashboard built from helix-dashboard, connecting to the Helix service for memory visualization and published on host port 48173.

nodes.name: helix.toml
nodes.summary: HelixDB project configuration declaring the db queries directory, Docker container runtime, and the local dev instance (port 6969, enterprise-dev image, disk storage).

nodes.name: memory-system-handoff.md
nodes.summary: Authoritative build-handoff spec defining the project goal, tech stack, the six memory types, frozen decisions, the HelixDB data model, write/read paths, risks, and build order for the memory system.
nodes.languageNotes: Build-handoff document with frozen decisions, pending decisions, and an ordered build plan intended to drive an implementation session.

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: Node project manifest declaring ESM module type, tsx-driven scripts for the worker, MCP server, db bootstrap, and drift-gate experiments, plus HelixDB, MCP SDK, iii-sdk, and OpenAI dependencies.

nodes.name: tsconfig.json
nodes.summary: TypeScript compiler configuration targeting ES2022 with strict mode, bundler module resolution, and JSON module support, scoped to src and experiments while excluding the dashboard.

nodes.name: .understandignore
nodes.summary: Ignore-pattern manifest for the understand-anything analysis tooling, listing files and directories excluded from knowledge-graph scanning.

nodes.name: worker-entrypoint.sh
nodes.summary: Container entrypoint that gates worker startup on HelixDB (HTTP) and the iii engine (WS) readiness, bootstraps Helix indexes idempotently, then launches the UniMind write-pipeline worker.
nodes.languageNotes: POSIX sh readiness gate using curl/nc polling loops to substitute for an absent depends_on healthcheck on the Helix image.

nodes.name: worker.Dockerfile
nodes.summary: Single-stage Node 24 Alpine image that installs dependencies, copies the source tree, and runs the UniMind iii worker (write pipeline plus maintenance crons) via the readiness-gated entrypoint.
nodes.languageNotes: Adds curl/busybox-nc for the entrypoint readiness gate; uses npm ci against a committed lockfile for reproducible builds.

nodes.name: request.json
nodes.summary: Sample ingest request payload illustrating the parameters/query/request_type shape expected by the UniMind memory ingestion pipeline.

nodes.name: FINDINGS.md
nodes.summary: Experiment write-up concluding that the embedding-based drift gate fails structurally, and recommending a cheap LLM shift-classifier instead, with method, results, and repro steps across seven sections.

nodes.name: extract.ts
nodes.summary: Experiment harness that walks Claude project session transcripts, extracts non-meta user prompt text from JSONL content blocks, and writes a chronologically sorted dataset used to evaluate the drift gate.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses synchronous fs APIs (readFileSync/readdirSync) to parse JSONL transcripts line-by-line into prompt records.

layers.name: Claude Code Hooks
layers.description: Claude Code lifecycle hooks that capture tool-use turns and inject recalled memory context into prompts, plus the fire-and-forget event emit and stdout-discipline helpers that keep hooks non-blocking.

layers.name: Orchestration
layers.description: The iii worker engine that registers queue functions (ingestTurn, flushSession, sweepIdle) and cron triggers, plus the driver scripts that exercise the turn-event flow end to end.

layers.name: Write Pipeline
layers.description: The asynchronous write path that gates turns by salience, buffers session windows, extracts candidate memories via the LLM, resolves entities and conflicts, and persists memories with supersede/extends links.

layers.name: Read Pipeline
layers.description: The synchronous read path that plans a query, runs hybrid recall, ranks candidates within a token budget, and formats the injected context header surfaced back to the session.

layers.name: Matching & Maintenance
layers.description: The reusable matching engine and similarity scorers used for entity resolution, plus the background maintenance sweeps that decay, forget, expire memories and repair duplicate entities.

layers.name: Persistence & Foundation
layers.description: The HelixDB access layer (client, schema, entity and memory persistence, hybrid retrieval, bootstrap) together with the LLM completion/embedding clients and the central environment configuration the whole pipeline depends on.

layers.name: Interfaces
layers.description: The UniMind MCP server that exposes the recall and remember tools over stdio to Claude Code.

layers.name: Infrastructure & Config
layers.description: Container and orchestration definitions (Dockerfile, docker-compose services, entrypoint), HelixDB and build configuration, and project tooling files that deploy and configure the system.

layers.name: Documentation & Experiments
layers.description: System design and workflow documentation plus the offline drift-gate experiment that evaluates topic-shift detection heuristics against labeled sessions.
